<DESCRIPTION>H{alpha} data table for individual fiber measurements</DESCRIPTION>
<!-- +++No column could be found to attach a LINK in table: J/ApJS/276/59/table7 -->
<FIELD name="oRA" ucd="pos.eq.ra;arith.diff" datatype="float" width="5" precision="1" unit="arcsec"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_RA_OFF" -->
<FIELD name="oDE" ucd="pos.eq.dec;arith.diff" datatype="float" width="5" precision="1" unit="arcsec"><!-- ucd="POS_EQ_DEC_OFF" -->
<FIELD name="EWg" ucd="spect.line.eqWidth" datatype="float" width="6" precision="1" unit="1e-10m"><!-- ucd="SPECT_EQ-WIDTH" -->
<DESCRIPTION>[-0.2/1167]? H{alpha} emission equivalent width from sum of Gaussian line parameters</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="EWsum" ucd="spect.line.eqWidth" datatype="float" width="7" precision="1" unit="1e-10m"><!-- ucd="SPECT_EQ-WIDTH" -->
<DESCRIPTION>[-0.2/29060]? H{alpha} emission equivalent width from zeroth moment of line emission</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="logmuN" ucd="phot.mag.sb" datatype="float" width="6" precision="2" unit="log(mW.m**-2.arcsec**-2)"><!-- ucd="PHOT_SB_GENERAL" -->
<DESCRIPTION>[-16.6/-13] Log H{alpha} narrow component surface-brightness (flux within the 4.7" diameter fiber aperture); in erg/s/cm^2^/arcsec^2^</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="e_logmuN" ucd="stat.error;phot.mag.sb" datatype="float" width="5" precision="2" unit="log(mW.m**-2.arcsec**-2)"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="VelN" ucd="phys.veloc;arith.diff" datatype="float" width="6" precision="1" unit="km/s"><!-- ucd="VELOC_RELAT" -->
<DESCRIPTION>[-382/348] Narrow component velocity relative to kinematic model galaxy barycenter</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="e_VelN" ucd="stat.error;phys.veloc;arith.diff" datatype="float" width="6" precision="1" unit="km/s"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="sigmaN" ucd="phys.veloc.dispersion" datatype="float" width="5" precision="1" unit="km/s"><!-- ucd="VELOC_DISP" -->
<FIELD name="e_sigmaN" ucd="stat.error;phys.veloc.dispersion" datatype="float" width="5" precision="1" unit="km/s"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="logmuB" ucd="phot.mag.sb" datatype="float" width="6" precision="2" unit="log(mW.m**-2.arcsec**-2)"><!-- ucd="PHOT_SB_GENERAL" -->
<DESCRIPTION>[-99/-13]? Log H{alpha} broad component surface-brightness; in erg/s/cm^2^/arcsec^2^</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="e_logmuB" ucd="stat.error;phot.mag.sb" datatype="float" width="5" precision="2" unit="log(mW.m**-2.arcsec**-2)"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="VelB" ucd="phys.veloc;arith.diff" datatype="float" width="6" precision="1" unit="km/s"><!-- ucd="VELOC_RELAT" -->
<DESCRIPTION>[-487/340]? Broad component velocity relative to the kinematic model galaxy barycenter</DESCRIPTION>
<FIELD name="e_VelB" ucd="stat.error;phys.veloc;arith.diff" datatype="float" width="6" precision="1" unit="km/s"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
<FIELD name="sigmaB" ucd="phys.veloc.dispersion" datatype="float" width="5" precision="1" unit="km/s"><!-- ucd="VELOC_DISP" -->
<FIELD name="e_sigmaB" ucd="stat.error;phys.veloc.dispersion" datatype="float" width="5" precision="1" unit="km/s"><!-- ucd="ERROR" -->
